titleStmt.title: SII 26.282: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 282. (A.R. No. 267 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.

This inscription contains the praśasti of the king as in No. 280 above. It records the sale of a land in the same Tirukkachchūr by the ūr of the place for a sum of 10 gold anṟāḍu-naṟkāśu to a certain Śatturu-kālan Marundan of Tirukōvalūr in Naḍuvi-nāḍu; who endowed the money with the same ūr who had agreed to burn a nandā lamp in the temple of Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyār of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevuvaḷar tiruppoṉmārpu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nilampotu ciṟappa vijai
yamāmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icaiyuñ celvi meṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar van=tiṟañca niḻanilama
ṭantaiyai tirumaṇam puṇarn=ta cirvaḷartarum Aṇimuṭikavitten maṇimuṭi cūṭi mallai ñālattuppa
lluyirkkellām Ellaiyuḷinpamiyavuṭaneyta veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅkolocci vāḻipu
llūḻi Āḻi naṭappacempoṉ virasiṅhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟi run=taruḷiya
korājakesaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yā
ṇṭu Eḻāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattu ceṅkuṉ
ṟa nāṭṭut tirukkaccūrāna nittavinotanallūr Ūromādidāsaśaṇḍeśvara nilavi
lai Eṅkaḷūr vaṭakaḻaniyil kiḻkaṭayil rājanārāyaṇan tirunandavanattil ceṟa
l vatikku teṟkkum kiḻpārkkellai niroṭu kaṇṇikkālukku meṟkum tenpār
kkellai Aracūr kiḻavaṉ kuṇṭilukku vaṭavarampiṟ pātikku vaṭakkum melpā
rkkellai civapattadāsan jivanattukku kiḻakkum Ināppālellaikku naṭu
vupaṭṭa nilam patinaṟu cāṇkolāl kuḻinūṟum Iṉilattil menokkina ma
ramuṅ kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟum Uḷnilamoḻiviṉṟi Ikkamukaṭi nilattil kaṭukāl va
n=ta Iṟaiyum cilliṟai An=tarāyamum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakkaṭavomāka Iṟaiyiḻicci vi
lai viṟṟutarakoḷvirkaḷovenṟu kūṟa Immoḻi keṭṭu Etirmoḻi kuṭutton naṭuvināṭ
ṭu tirukovalūrilirukkuñ catturukālan maruntanen yānu ṅkaḷ muṟ collappaṭi
kkuṭi nilam tirukkaccūr tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyārkku tirunun=tāviḷakku Onṟukku Ādidāsa
śaṇḍeśvaravilaiyāka viṟṟuttaricikoḷvenen muṟcollappaṭṭa kaccūrāna nittavi
notanallūrarom piṟkūṟiya catturukālan marun=tanukku Emmilicain=ta vilaippoṉan�ṟāṭu naṟkā
cu pattuñ śaṇḍeśvaravilaiyāka kaikkoṇṭu Ittevarkku tirunandāviḷakkoṉṟum can=tirā
tittavaṟ celvatāka cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom kaccūrāna Ūrom Itu kaccūruṭaiyā
n Eḻuttu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.282 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
